requirements_for_enrollment.description: Requirements for Enrollment. Empty string means no restrictions and students have access without prerequisite restrictions. "course_prerequisite_enabled" means prerequisite courses must be completed first. "course_points_enabled" means a specific number of course points are required for access.

prerequisite_compare.description: Prerequisite Compare Mode. "ALL" means all prerequisites must be completed. "ANY" means at least one prerequisite must be completed. Requires "requirements_for_enrollment" to be set to "course_prerequisite_enabled".

prerequisites.description: Course prerequisites. Requires "requirements_for_enrollment" to be set to "course_prerequisite_enabled".

points_access.description: Number of course points required to gain access to this course.

course_start_date.description: Start Date in RFC3339 format. IMPORTANT: LLMs must ALWAYS ask for the user's timezone if not explicitly provided - do not assume UTC. If the user does not specify a timezone, stop and ask them before proceeding. The user's timezone must be included with the date for accuracy (e.g., '2025-12-01T04:30:00-05:00' for EST). Setting this to '0' will clear the date.

course_end_date.description: End Date in RFC3339 format. IMPORTANT: LLMs must ALWAYS ask for the user's timezone if not explicitly provided - do not assume UTC. If the user does not specify a timezone, stop and ask them before proceeding. The user's timezone must be included with the date for accuracy (e.g., '2025-12-01T04:30:00-05:00' for EST). Setting this to '0' will clear the date.

course_seats_limit.description: Limits the number of students who can take your course. When the limit is reached the course can no longer be purchased or enrolled in. Admins can enroll students even if the limit is reached. It does not affect open courses. 0 means no limit.

visible_type.description: Availability Release Schedule. Empty means immediately available, "visible_after" means available X days after enrollment, "visible_after_specific_date" means available on a specific date.

visible_after.description: Released X day(s) after course enrollment

visible_after_specific_date.description: Available after a specific date as a unix timestamp

is_external.description: Whether the quiz takes place in a virtual setting (e.g, Zoom) or in-person outside of LearnDash.

external_type.description: The type of external quiz. "virtual" means the quiz takes place in a virtual setting (e.g, Zoom). "in-person" means the quiz takes place in-person.

external_require_attendance.description: Whether attendance is required for the external quiz.

prerequisites.description: The quiz prerequisites for this quiz.

registered_users_only.description: Only logged-in users can take this quiz

certificate_award_threshold.description: Quiz certificate threshold percentage to earn the certificate as a decimal. The Quiz Certificate value must be set for this to take effect.

quiz_resume.description: Whether the Quiz can be saved and resumed later.

quiz_resume_cookie_send_timer.description: Save Quiz resume cookie data to the server every x seconds.

retry_restrictions_enabled.description: Whether the Quiz can be retaken only a certain number of times.

retry_repeats.description: Number of repeats allowed. blank is unlimited, 0 is 1 repeats, 1 is 2 repeats, etc.

answer_all_questions_enabled.description: Whether all Questions are required to complete the Quiz.

time_limit_time.description: Automatically submit after x seconds. Requires the "Time Limit Enabled" setting to be enabled.

auto_start.description: Whether the quiz starts automatically, without the "Start quiz" button

quiz_modus.description: The display mode of the quiz. "single" means one question at a time, "multiple" means all questions at once.

review_table_enabled.description: Whether the question overview table is enabled.

summary_hide.description: Whether the quiz summary is enabled in the question overview table.

skip_question_disabled.description: Whether the questions can be skipped. Must use the "One Question at a time" and "Display results after each submitted answer" settings in the Question Display setting.

show_max_question.description: Whether to only display subset of questions. Randomize question order must be enabled.

show_points.description: Whether to display the point value for each question when taking the quiz.

show_category.description: Whether to display the category for each question when taking the quiz.

hide_question_position_overview.description: Whether to show the position of each question when taking the quiz.

hide_question_numbering.description: Whether to show the number for each question when taking the quiz.

numbered_answer.description: Whether to show the number for each question answer when taking the quiz.

answer_random.description: Whether to randomize the answers for each question when taking the quiz.

title_hidden.description: Whether to show the title for the quiz above the quiz when taking it.

restart_button_hide.description: Whether to show the "Restart Quiz" button on the Results page.

show_average_result.description: Whether to show the average score of all users who took the Quiz on the results page.

show_category_score.description: Whether to show the score achieved for each Question category on the results page.

hide_result_points.description: Whether to show the overall Quiz score on the results page.

hide_result_correct_question.description: Whether to show the number of correctly answered Questions on the results page.

hide_result_quiz_time.description: Whether to show the time spent on the Quiz on the results page.

custom_answer_feedback.description: Whether to show custom answer feedback for each Question on the results page.

hide_answer_message_box.description: Whether to show the correct / incorrect messages for each Question on the results page. Requires the "Custom Answer Feedback" setting to be enabled.

disabled_answer_mark.description: Whether to show the correct / incorrect answer marks for each Question on the results page. Requires the "Custom Answer Feedback" setting to be enabled.

view_question_button_hidden.description: Whether to show the "View Questions" button on the results page. Requires the "Custom Answer Feedback" setting to be enabled.

toplist_data_add_permissions.description: Who can apply to the leaderboard. 1 is all users, 2 is registered users only, 3 is anonymous users only.

toplist_data_add_multiple.description: Whether users can apply more than once to the leaderboard.

toplist_data_add_automatic.description: Whether users are added automatically to the leaderboard.

toplist_data_show_limit.description: The number of entries to display on the leaderboard.

toplist_data_sort.description: The sort order of the leaderboard. 1 is best user, 2 is newest entry, 3 is oldest entry.

toplist_data_showin_enabled.description: Whether the leaderboard is displayed on the results page.

view_profile_statistics_enabled.description: Whether the front-end profile display is enabled for statistics.

statistics_ip_lock_enabled.description: Whether statistics are protected from spam by checking the IP address.

email_admin_enabled.description: Whether admin email notifications are enabled.

email_user_enabled.description: Whether user email notifications are enabled.

toplist_data_add_delay.description: The delay in minutes before a user can add more data to the leaderboard.

toplist_data_shown.description: The location of the leaderboard on the results page. 1 is below the result text, 2 is in a button.

statistics_ip_lock.description: How often statistics will be saved in minutes from the same IP. The "statistics_ip_lock_enabled" setting must be enabled for this to take effect.

email_notification.description: Which users should cause the admin to receive an email notification on quiz completion. "2" is all users, "1" is registered users only.

toplist_data_add_automatic.description: Whether users are added automatically to the leaderboard.

toplist_data_show_limit.description: The number of entries to display on the leaderboard.

toplist_data_sort.description: The sort order of the leaderboard. 1 is best user, 2 is newest entry, 3 is oldest entry.

toplist_data_showin_enabled.description: Whether the leaderboard is displayed on the results page.

view_profile_statistics_enabled.description: Whether the front-end profile display is enabled for statistics.

statistics_ip_lock_enabled.description: Whether statistics are protected from spam by checking the IP address.

email_admin_enabled.description: Whether admin email notifications are enabled.

email_user_enabled.description: Whether user email notifications are enabled.

toplist_data_add_delay.description: The delay in minutes before a user can add more data to the leaderboard.

toplist_data_shown.description: The location of the leaderboard on the results page. 1 is below the result text, 2 is in a button.

statistics_ip_lock.description: How often statistics will be saved in minutes from the same IP. The "statistics_ip_lock_enabled" setting must be enabled for this to take effect.

email_notification.description: Which users should cause the admin to receive an email notification on quiz completion. "2" is all users, "1" is registered users only.

question_type.description: The type of question. Options include: 'single' (Single choice), 'multiple' (Multiple choice), 'free_answer' (Free choice), 'sort_answer' (Sorting choice), 'matrix_sort_answer' (Matrix Sorting choice), 'cloze_answer' (Fill in the blank), 'assessment_answer' (Assessment), 'essay' (Essay / Open Answer).

points_show_in_message.description: Show reached points in the correct/incorrect message? Requires "Different points for each answer" to be enabled.

points_diff_modus.description: Whether different points can be awarded for each answer. Requires "Different points for each answer" to be enabled and for the Question Type to be "single".

disable_correct.description: Disable the distinction between correct and incorrect answers. Requires "points_diff_modus" to be enabled.

correct_message.description: Message shown when Question is correct.

incorrect_message.description: Message shown when Question is incorrect. Cannot be used when the "Same correct and incorrect message text" setting is enabled.

correct_same.description: Whether to use the same correct and incorrect message text for this Question.

_html.description: Whether the HTML is allowed in the answer or not

_points.description: The number of points that can be obtained from the answer. Only used if "points_per_answer" is enabled for the Question.

_sortString.description: Sort String. Only used for the "matrix_sort_answer" Question type. This is the draggable element that you match with the "_answer" field.

_sortStringHtml.description: Whether HTML is enabled for _sortString. Only used for the "matrix_sort_answer" Question type.

_graded.description: Whether the answer can be graded or not.

_gradingProgression.description: Determines how should the answer to this question be marked and graded upon submission. Only applies to the "essay" question type

_gradedType.description: Determines how a user can submit answer. Only applies to the "essay" Question type

question_type.description: The type of question. Options include: 'single' (Single choice), 'multiple' (Multiple choice), 'free_answer' (Free choice), 'sort_answer' (Sorting choice), 'matrix_sort_answer' (Matrix Sorting choice), 'cloze_answer' (Fill in the blank), 'assessment_answer' (Assessment), 'essay' (Essay / Open Answer).

points_show_in_message.description: Show reached points in the correct/incorrect message? Requires "Different points for each answer" to be enabled.

points_diff_modus.description: Whether different points can be awarded for each answer. Requires "Different points for each answer" to be enabled and for the Question Type to be "single".

disable_correct.description: Disable the distinction between correct and incorrect answers. Requires "points_diff_modus" to be enabled.

correct_message.description: Message shown when Question is correct.

incorrect_message.description: Message shown when Question is incorrect. Cannot be used when the "Same correct and incorrect message text" setting is enabled.

correct_same.description: Whether to use the same correct and incorrect message text for this Question.

_html.description: Whether the HTML is allowed in the answer or not

_points.description: The number of points that can be obtained from the answer. Only used if "points_per_answer" is enabled for the Question.

_sortString.description: Sort String. Only used for the "matrix_sort_answer" Question type. This is the draggable element that you match with the "_answer" field.

_sortStringHtml.description: Whether HTML is enabled for _sortString. Only used for the "matrix_sort_answer" Question type.

_graded.description: Whether the answer can be graded or not.

_gradingProgression.description: Determines how should the answer to this question be marked and graded upon submission. Only applies to the "essay" question type

_gradedType.description: Determines how a user can submit answer. Only applies to the "essay" Question type

default_ping_status.description: Allow link notifications from other blogs (pingbacks and trackbacks) on new articles.

default_comment_status.title: Allow comments on new posts
default_comment_status.description: Allow people to submit comments on new posts.

gutenberg-block-experiments.title: Experimental blocks
gutenberg-block-experiments.description: Enables experimental blocks on a rolling basis as they are developed. (Warning: these blocks may have significant changes during development that cause validation errors and display issues.)

gutenberg-form-blocks.title: Form and input blocks
gutenberg-form-blocks.description: Enables new blocks to allow building forms. You are likely to experience UX issues that are being addressed.

gutenberg-grid-interactivity.title: Grid interactivity
gutenberg-grid-interactivity.description: Enables enhancements to the Grid block that let you move and resize items in the editor canvas.

gutenberg-classic-block-deprecation.title: Classic block deprecation
gutenberg-classic-block-deprecation.description: Enables UI changes aimed at deprecating the Classic block, including prompts on existing Classic blocks to migrate their content to blocks or to a Custom HTML block.

gutenberg-media-editor.title: Media Editor (Route)
gutenberg-media-editor.description: Enables a dedicated route-based media editor screen for editing media items (metadata and content).

gutenberg-dataviews-media-modal.title: Media Upload Modal
gutenberg-dataviews-media-modal.description: Replaces the existing WordPress media modal with a new modal powered by Data Views, supporting browsing, selecting, and uploading media.

gutenberg-content-only-inspector-fields.title: Block fields: Show dataform driven inspector fields on blocks that support them
gutenberg-content-only-inspector-fields.description: Enables editable block inspector fields that are generated using a dataform.

gutenberg-dataform-inspector.title: Editor Inspector: Use DataForm
gutenberg-dataform-inspector.description: Replaces the bespoke editor inspector panels with a unified DataForm-based implementation for Pages and Posts, matching the QuickEdit experience.

gutenberg-full-page-client-side-navigati.title: Full-page client-side navigation
gutenberg-full-page-client-side-navigati.description: Enables full-page client-side navigation, powered by the Interactivity API.

active_templates.title: Template Activation
active_templates.description: Allows multiple templates of the same type to be created, of which one can be active at a time. (Warning: when you deactivate this experiment, it is best to delete all created templates except for the active ones.)

gutenberg-color-randomizer.title: Color randomizer
gutenberg-color-randomizer.description: Enables the Global Styles color randomizer in the Site Editor; a utility that lets you mix the current color palette pseudo-randomly.

gutenberg-workflow-palette.title: Workflow Palette
gutenberg-workflow-palette.description: Enables the Workflow Palette for running workflows composed of abilities, from a unified interface.

gutenberg-extensible-site-editor.title: Extensible Site Editor
gutenberg-extensible-site-editor.description: Redirects the default site editor (Appearance > Design) to use the extensible site editor page.

gutenberg-guidelines.title: Guidelines
gutenberg-guidelines.description: Enables guidelines feature for managing editorial voice and tone guidelines under Settings.

gutenberg-content-types.title: Content types
gutenberg-content-types.description: Enables a UI for creating and managing custom taxonomies and custom post types under Settings.

gutenberg-dashboard-widgets.title: New Dashboard experience
gutenberg-dashboard-widgets.description: Enables a new dashboard experience with resizable, reorderable widgets that plugins can register and users can personalize.

gutenberg-admin-bar-in-editor.title: Toolbar in editor
gutenberg-admin-bar-in-editor.description: Shows the Toolbar in the fullscreen Post and Site Editor.
